'''jaloko''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:mycol|mycol]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| j-l-k
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:mycol|mycol]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| jaloko
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:jæleketh|jæleketh]] || [[word:jælekej|jælekej]] || [[word:jælekesh|jælekesh]] || [[word:jæleke|jæleke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:jalolokoth|jalolokoth]] || [[word:jalolokoj|jalolokoj]] || [[word:jalolokosh|jalolokosh]] || [[word:jaloloko|jaloloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:jalokoth|jalokoth]] || [[word:jalokoj|jalokoj]] || [[word:jalokosh|jalokosh]] || [[word:jaloko|jaloko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:jalofkoth|jalofkoth]] || [[word:jalofkoj|jalofkoj]] || [[word:jalofkosh|jalofkosh]] || [[word:jalofkof|jalofkof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:jalokotho|jalokotho]] || [[word:jalokojo|jalokojo]] || [[word:jalokosho|jalokosho]] || [[word:jalokoko|jalokoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:jalokoth|jalokoth]] || [[word:jalokoj|jalokoj]] || [[word:jalokosh|jalokosh]] || [[word:jaloko|jaloko]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:jalokothol|jalokothol]] || [[word:jalokojol|jalokojol]] || [[word:jalokoshol|jalokoshol]] || [[word:jalokokol|jalokokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:jalokothotho|jalokothotho]] || [[word:jalokojojo|jalokojojo]] || [[word:jalokoshosho|jalokoshosho]] || [[word:jalokoko|jalokoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:jalokothon|jalokothon]] || [[word:jalokojon|jalokojon]] || [[word:jalokoshon|jalokoshon]] || [[word:jalokokon|jalokokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:jalokothoro|jalokothoro]] || [[word:jalokojoro|jalokojoro]] || [[word:jalokoshoro|jalokoshoro]] || [[word:jalokokoro|jalokokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|7318718}}
